description: Perform a parametric study on the effect of camber on aerodynamic efficiency using QBlade. Generate four airfoils with 15% thickness and varying camber: NACA 0015, NACA 2415, NACA 4415, and NACA 6415. Conduct an XFOIL Direct Analysis on each airfoil with a Reynolds Number of 500,000, Ncrit of 9, and an Alpha Range of -5 to 20 degrees (0.5 step). Determine the Maximum Lift-to-Drag Ratio (L/D_max) and corresponding alpha for each airfoil. Create a report file at /home/ga/Documents/camber_study_report.txt listing the results for each airfoil and identifying the best one. Format the report as: "NACA [XXXX]: L/D_max = [value], at alpha = [value] deg" and "BEST AIRFOIL: NACA [XXXX]". Save the QBlade project containing all airfoils and polars to /home/ga/Documents/projects/camber_study.wpa.
